debug_info.goal:
case right.right
p : ℕ
h : Fact (Nat.Prime p)
⊢ ∃ m, p = 4 * m + 1 → {s | s ^ 2 = -1}.card = 0

proof:
use 0
      intro h'
      simp only [mul_zero, zero_add] at h'
      have hp' := h.out
      rw [h'] at hp'
      exact absurd hp' Nat.not_prime_one
failed_attempts:
use 0
      intro hp
      have : p = 1 := hp
      have : Nat.Prime p := h.out
      omega

use 0
      intro hp
      simp at hp

use 0
      intro hp
      have : p.Prime := h.out
      omega

use 0
      intro hp
      simp only [mul_zero, zero_add] at hp
      have : p.Prime := h.out
      omega
successful_attempts:
use 0
      intro h'
      simp only [mul_zero, zero_add] at h'
      have hp' := h.out
      rw [h'] at hp'
      exact absurd hp' Nat.not_prime_one

use 0
      intro hp
      simp at hp
      have : Nat.Prime p := h.out
      rw [hp] at this
      exact absurd this Nat.not_prime_one
